name: Honey-Ginger Snaps
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 375°F.
2 Cream the honey, butter, sugar, and egg together.
3 Sift the remaining ingredients (flour, baking soda, salt, ginger, cinnamon, cloves) together, and add to the butter mixture.
4 Chill for one hour.
5 Roll level tablespoons of dough into balls and place 2 inches apart on a greased cookie sheet.
6 Bake for 10 to 12 minutes.
